items.title: Market and user segmentation
items.description: Cluster customers, products, or content by behavioral features to guide campaigns, pricing, and personalization before expensive labeling projects.

items.title: Exploratory visualization
items.description: Reduce high-dimensional embeddings or sensor streams to 2D/3D views so teams can spot clusters, trajectories, and outliers during EDA.

items.title: Anomaly and fraud monitoring
items.description: Score transactions, logs, or metrics against a learned normal pattern to prioritize investigation when labeled incidents are scarce.

items.title: Representation pre-training
items.description: Learn compact encodings (autoencoders, contrastive embeddings) from unlabeled corpora or images that improve downstream supervised fine-tuning.
